creator: george@m5p.com
text: Mark, thank you sincerely for your help in tracking this down.  I have temporarily rearranged my startup script to increase my chance of getting more crashes (it seems loading amdgpu AFTER zfs, acpi_wmi, and vboxnetflt makes the crash more likely, so of late I have been loading amdgpu FIRST so I can get more work done), and if that occurs, I will put some more vmcores in the directory I told you about earlier today.  Your assistance is GREATLY appreciated!
